attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM,
COALESCE (MAX ( CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)) - INTERVAL '1'  MINUTE ) 
		OVER (PARTITION BY 	TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY
			  ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM ASC 
			  ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') END_TV_DTM ,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.RELEASED_ROLE,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
TVOUTPUT.SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
TVOUTPUT.DV_SOL_HOLD_DT,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER () 
	OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY
		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM ASC) RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NSOLHT_OUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY  IS NOT NULL  THEN 'U'ELSE 'I' END) DML_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT ,
TVOUTPUT.SO_HOLD_COMMENT  ,
TVOUTPUT. RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT

FROM
	(
	SELECT
	TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
	TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM,
      TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	TVINPUT.BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME,
	TVINPUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
	TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	TVINPUT.RELEASED_ROLE,
	TVINPUT.SS_CODE,
	TVINPUT.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
	TVINPUT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME,
	TVINPUT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
	TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME1,
	TVINPUT.SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
    TVINPUT.SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME ,
    TVINPUT.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
	TVINPUT.SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
	TVINPUT.DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
	TVINPUT.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
	TVINPUT.RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
	TVINPUT.DV_SOL_HOLD_DT,
	TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE,
	TVINPUT.SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT ,
TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_COMMENT  ,
TVINPUT. RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT,
	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
							TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
							TVINPUT.BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME,
							TVINPUT.RELEASED_ROLE,
							TVINPUT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME,
							TVINPUT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
							TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_COMMENT  ,
TVINPUT. RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT
			ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM  
	FROM
		(
		SELECT
		WISOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY	AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
		WISOLH.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME  AS 	START_TV_DTM,
		WISOLH.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		WISOLH.BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME			AS BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME,
		WISOLH.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME		AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
		WISOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY			AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		WISOLH.RELEASED_ROLE				AS RELEASED_ROLE,
		WISOLH.SS_CODE  					AS SS_CODE,
		WISOLH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT			AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
		WISOLH.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME	AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME,
		WISOLH.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD	AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
		WISOLH.SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME	AS SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
		WISOLH.SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME     	AS SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME  ,
		WISOLH.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT		AS SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
		WISOLH.SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME AS SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
		WISOLH.DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY AS DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
		WISOLH.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
		WISOLH.RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT AS RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
		WISOLH.DV_SOL_HOLD_DT AS DV_SOL_HOLD_DT,
		'I' ACTION_CODE,
		WISOLH.SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT AS SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
		WISOLH.HOLD_COMMENT AS SO_HOLD_COMMENT  ,
		WISOLH.RELEASE_COMMENT AS RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT
		
		FROM
		(SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_NRT 
		 UNION ALL
		 SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_SALES_ORD_LINE_HOLD_NRT /*Added as part of PR22169 to load XAAS Holds Data - lnuka*/
		 )WISOLH
		 		
		UNION ALL
		
		SELECT
		NSOLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY		AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
		NSOLHT.START_TV_DTM					AS START_TV_DTM,
		NSOLHT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME				AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		NSOLHT.BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME			AS BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME,
		NSOLHT.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME		AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
		NSOLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY			AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		NSOLHT.RELEASED_ROLE					AS RELEASED_ROLE,
		NSOLHT.SS_CODE							AS SS_CODE,
		NSOLHT.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT			AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
		NSOLHT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME	AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME,
		NSOLHT.RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD	AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
		NSOLHT.SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME  AS SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
        	NSOLHT.SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME   AS SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
        	NSOLHT.SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT      AS SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
		NSOLHT.SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME AS SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
		NSOLHT.DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY AS DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
		NSOLHT.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
		NSOLHT.RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT AS RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
		NSOLHT.DV_SOL_HOLD_DT AS DV_SOL_HOLD_DT,
		'X' ACTION_CODE,
		NSOLHT.SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT as SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
				NSOLHT.SOL_HOLD_COMMENT AS SO_HOLD_COMMENT  ,
		NSOLHT.RU_SOL_RELEASE_COMMENT AS RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT
		FROM
		$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_NRT_TV NSOLHT
		WHERE NSOLHT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
		AND EXISTS
		(
		SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_NRT 
		                UNION ALL
						SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_SALES_ORD_LINE_HOLD_NRT /*Added as part of PR22169 to load XAAS Holds Data - lnuka*/
							)WISOLH
		WHERE NSOLHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY = WISOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY
		)
		) TVINPUT
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY, TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
	) TVOUTPUT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_NRT_TV NSOLHT_OUT
ON (NSOLHT_OUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY = TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY
	AND NSOLHT_OUT.END_TV_DTM ='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
